signal: Project check cron needed two-stage dirty detection, log removal, timeout increase — human coordinated fix
action: Cron prompt rewritten with observation→fix two-stage mechanism, timeout 120→240s, log writing removed

signal: Weather broadcast cron timed out at 120s — model spent time searching session history for channel ID, leaked English reasoning
action: Model changed to sonnet-4-6, prompt rewritten with explicit constraints, timeout 120→180s, verbose globally disabled

signal: Heartbeat stale alerts flooding — config.patch restarts cause false positives
action: Added age-based stale detection (>35min = stale, no alert), gwup downgraded to info-only

signal: Version update cron poor quality — hallucinated version count, announce delivery silently failing
action: Prompt rewritten with structured format, dedup mechanism, anti-hallucination rules, model switched to sonnet-4-6, explicit message tool calls instead of announce

signal: PCEC produced 6+ consecutive skips while daily logs contained major human-intervention signals — skip epidemic
action: Root cause: previous cycles only did shallow error-log grep, dismissed daily-log signals. This cycle establishes convergence tracking infrastructure to prevent future blind spots.

signal: Timeout standardization was ad-hoc — each cron had inconsistent timeouts causing failures
wechat-mp-publisher v0.1.0 missing from README.md and README_CN.md — discovered by ACP Codex audit but never fixed
action: Added wechat-mp-publisher to both README tables
